data.title: GoldMining Commences 2026 Exploration Program at its São Jorge Project, Brazil
data.description: GoldMining Inc. has started an exploration drill program on its São Jorge Project in Vancouver, BC. The project is 100% owned by the company and aims to conduct exploration activities. GoldMining is listed on both TSX (GOLD) and NYSE American (GLDG). This development occurred on March 30, 2026.

data.title: Jones Soda Expands Fallout™ Beverage Platform with National Club Store Rollout of Sunset Sarsaparilla 12-Packs
data.description: Seattle-based Jones Soda Co. revealed today their national deployment of 12-packs of Sunset Sarsaparilla, inspired by the video game Fallout™, to club store outlets throughout the US and Canada. As a prominent craft soda producer, Jones Soda Co. (CSE: JSDA) (OTCQB: JSDA) is expanding its market reach with this latest product launch.

data.title: INJ projected to hit $3.25 by April 2026, with short-term target at $3.15 and bullish breakout at $3.09. Support at $2.77.
data.description: Summary of INJ Price Prediction:- Short-term target (1 week): Expected to reach $3.15. - Medium-term forecast (1 month): Projected to be within the range of $3.25 to $3.50. - Bullish breakout level: Identified at $3.09. - Critical support level: Stands at $2.77. Analysts are optimistic about the future of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: SaintQuant Launches AI Crypto Trading Bot Platform, Streamlining Market Analysis & Profitable Strategies
data.description: In Cairns, Australia, on March 30, 2026, SaintQuant, a tech company, has introduced an AI-driven crypto trading bot platform targeting the cryptocurrency industry. This platform leverages artificial intelligence, machine learning, and deep learning models to enhance trading strategies.

data.title: Transcend Launches Agentic Assist and MCP Server to Help Enterprises Move at the Speed of AI
data.description: In San Francisco, a recent development in new products has revolutionized the efficiency of privacy teams by simplifying compliance workflows. This advancement has significantly decreased the time spent on manual work, reducing it from several days to just a few minutes of guided review.

data.title: Correction: Outcome of Subscription to Coop Pank AS Unsecured Subordinated Bonds
data.description: Clarification has been provided regarding the offer allocation percentage in point 4, as an inaccuracy was detected in the initial notice due to a technical error. The accurate percentage for point 4 allocation is 10.9%, as opposed to the previously mentioned figure.

data.title: EnviroGold Global Appoints Greg O’Connor as Principal Metallurgist to Support Project Delivery and Commercial Deployment
data.description: Dr. Greg O'Connor has been appointed as the Principal Metallurgist at EnviroGold to lead mine waste and tailings projects towards commercial deployment and expansion. This strategic move aims to utilize Dr. O'Connor's expertise in metallurgy, leveraging his experience to drive growth within the company. With this appointment, EnviroGold anticipates significant progress in their mining operations and endeavours to enhance their environmental impact.

data.title: Kraken Robotics Appoints Don Robertson to Board of Directors and John Salama as Chief Information Officer
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, Kraken Robotics Inc. (TSX-V: PNG, OTCQB: KRKNF) announced two key changes. Don Robertson has been appointed to the company's Board of Directors, while John Salama has been promoted to Chief Information Officer. These changes are effective immediately, marking significant developments for the company.

data.title: Sysco to Acquire Jetro Restaurant Depot to Expand into Higher-Margin, Growing, and Resilient Cash & Carry Channel
data.description: The merger brings together two top leaders in the foodservice industry to form a dominant multi-channel distribution platform in the U.S. food-away-from-home sector. The deal combines the strengths of both companies to leverage their market positions and expand their reach. This merger is expected to significantly impact the industry landscape and enhance their competitive edge. The new entity aims to capitalize on this consolidation to achieve a substantial increase in market share and drive growth.

data.title: Equinox Gold Updates Canadian Operations Technical Outlook: Average 540,000 Ounces Gold Production per Year for Next 10 Years
data.description: Equinox Gold has released findings from the latest technical assessments for its Greenstone and Valentine mines. The reports reveal updated figures for mineral reserves and resources at the mines. Key numbers include new reserve estimates and resource inventory, highlighting significant updates to the company's mining operations.

data.title: FLOKI price could hit $0.000035 by April 2026, trading at $0.00002811 with RSI at 44.40. MACD signals caution.
data.description: The cryptocurrency token FLOKI is currently trading at $0.00002811, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 44.40. Based on technical analysis, there is a projected potential increase to $0.000035 due to a consolidation pattern observed. However, the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals suggest a note of caution despite the positive outlook.

data.title: UK: TotalEnergies Completes the Merger of its UK North Sea Upstream Assets with NEO NEXT
data.description: TotalEnergies has successfully merged NEO NEXT with its UK Upstream Oil & Gas business to form NEO NEXT+, with TotalEnergies owning a 47.5% stake. The new entity is set to become the leading independent Oil and Gas producer in the UK Continental Shelf, projecting a production exceeding 250,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day by 2026.
